queue.task: Review Apr 21 results. 100% pass on both projects. Today: depth on HenryDB (join extraction, tpch-compiled fixes, cost model) + SAT solver quick win.
queue.summary: Reviewed Apr 21: 175 tasks, 100% pass both projects, db.js 50% reduction. Queue aligned with TODO. No changes needed.

queue.goal: HenryDB: Extract JOIN executor from db.js (~1200 LOC) — full extraction with tests
queue.summary: Planned join extraction: 15 methods (~1075 LOC) from db.js into join-executor.js. 2 BUILD tasks: extract + verify.

queue.task: Extract join executor methods from db.js into join-executor.js (~1075 LOC)
queue.summary: Extracted 15 join methods (1074 LOC) from db.js into join-executor.js. db.js 6639→5582 lines. 226+ join tests pass, 0 regressions.

queue.task: Verify all join tests pass after extraction, fix any breakage
queue.summary: Full verification: 213 MVCC+Volcano tests pass, 226+ join tests pass, 0 regressions across all test suites.

queue.task: Git commit+push, dashboard health check, knowledge capture
queue.summary: Git pushed. Dashboard online and regenerated (22 blocks, 4 done). Workspace clean.

queue.task: Reflect on join extraction. Quality check: is db.js cleaner? Any broken boundaries?
queue.summary: Extraction quality good. db.js 5582 lines. No broken boundaries. Cost model functions coupled with join code - ok for now. Updated TODO.

queue.goal: HenryDB: Fix 6 tpch-compiled.test.js failures (CTE import issue)
queue.summary: Root cause: compile threshold raised to 5000 on Apr 21, but test uses scale=1 (max 1200 rows). Fix: set _compileThreshold=50 in test.

queue.task: Fix tpch-compiled.test.js: set _compileThreshold=50 to test compilation at small scale
queue.summary: Fixed 6 tpch-compiled failures. Root cause: compile threshold 5000 > test data size. Set _compileThreshold=50 in tests. 7/7 pass.

queue.task: Git commit+push, check email/GitHub, dashboard update
queue.summary: Git pushed. Dashboard online.

queue.task: Mid-day direction check. How is HenryDB depth going? Adjust afternoon priorities.
queue.summary: Progress good: join extraction + tpch fix done. InstrumentedIterator exists but not wired to EXPLAIN ANALYZE. Queue on track.

queue.goal: HenryDB: Wire InstrumentedIterator for per-operator timing in EXPLAIN ANALYZE
queue.summary: Plan: build Volcano plan in EXPLAIN ANALYZE, wrap with instrumentPlan(), execute, add per-operator timing output.

queue.task: Wire InstrumentedIterator into EXPLAIN ANALYZE: build+execute Volcano plan with timing, add per-operator output
queue.summary: Wired InstrumentedIterator into EXPLAIN ANALYZE. Per-operator timing for all Volcano operators. 5 new tests + 80 existing pass.

queue.task: Git commit+push, knowledge capture
queue.summary: Git pushed. Knowledge captured in daily log.

queue.goal: HenryDB: Volcano cost model — add selectivity heuristic to IndexScan vs SeqScan decision
queue.summary: Plan: add selectivity check in tryIndexScan. If estimated rows > 30% of total, skip index and use SeqScan. Use 1/ndv for equality, 33% for ranges.

queue.task: Add selectivity-based IndexScan vs SeqScan decision in Volcano planner tryIndexScan, with tests
queue.summary: Added selectivity heuristic: range queries on <500 row tables prefer SeqScan. Equality always uses IndexScan. All tests pass.

queue.task: Git commit+push, dashboard regenerate
queue.summary: Pushed. Dashboard up.

queue.task: Afternoon reflection. What did depth work reveal? Any new bugs or patterns?
queue.summary: 5 BUILDs done. One mild surprise (mislabeled root cause). Patterns: db-first-param extraction works well, always verify root cause. Continuing to SAT solver.

queue.goal: SAT solver: Fix SMT strict inequality bug in _processAssertion (8-line quick win)
queue.summary: Confirmed: _processAssertion handles <= and >= but not < and >. Arith path handles them but fallback silently drops them.

queue.task: Add < and > handling to _processAssertion in smt.cjs, add edge case tests
queue.summary: Added < and > handling to _processAssertion fallback. 46/46 tests pass. Safety net for edge cases.

queue.task: Git commit+push, full workspace sync
queue.summary: All repos pushed. Workspace synced.

queue.task: HenryDB: Read PostgreSQL EXPLAIN ANALYZE output format — compare with our Volcano EXPLAIN
queue.summary: Compared PG vs our format. Gaps: (1) no est vs actual comparison, (2) no Rows Removed by Filter, (3) no loops count, (4) no cost range. Most valuable: est+actual comparison for planner accuracy.

queue.task: Research: query compilation techniques (Hyper-style data-centric codegen vs Volcano iterator model)
queue.summary: Researched Volcano vs HyPer codegen vs vectorized execution. Key insight: vectorized (batch-at-a-time) is best next step for JS — reduces function call overhead, helps V8 JIT. Notes saved.

queue.task: Generate next batch: focus on HenryDB depth (EXPLAIN enrichment, GROUP BY extraction, test stats integration) and neural-net fix
queue.summary: Generated 13 tasks through 2PM. Focus: EXPLAIN enrichment, GROUP BY extraction, Volcano stats integration, EXPLAIN extraction, stress testing.

queue.goal: HenryDB: Add estimated rows to Volcano EXPLAIN ANALYZE (PG-style est vs actual comparison)
queue.summary: Plan: attach _estimatedRows to each Volcano node in buildPlan. SeqScan=rowCount, Filter=33% selectivity, Join=product/ndv. InstrumentedIterator shows est+actual.

queue.task: Add _estimatedRows to Volcano plan nodes and show est vs actual in InstrumentedIterator explain output
queue.summary: Added _estimatedRows to all Volcano plan nodes. EXPLAIN ANALYZE now shows est vs actual per operator. 108 Volcano + 5 explain tests pass.
Skipped: placeholder filled by T38.

queue.goal: HenryDB: Extract GROUP BY executor from db.js (~166 LOC)
queue.summary: GROUP BY is _selectWithGroupBy at lines 4595-5119 = 525 LOC (not 166 estimated). References 13 db methods. Extraction follows db first-param pattern.

queue.task: Extract _selectWithGroupBy from db.js into group-by-executor.js (~525 LOC, not 166)
queue.summary: Extracted GROUP BY executor (525 LOC) into group-by-executor.js. db.js 5582→5082 lines (49% from peak). 249 tests pass.
Skipped: placeholder filled by T39.

queue.goal: Neural-net: Fix 3 sliding-window.test.js failures
queue.summary: Skipped: 2-project limit (henrydb + sat-solver).

queue.task: Git commit+push, mid-session sync
queue.summary: Pushed. Mid-session sync done.

queue.goal: HenryDB: Pass ANALYZE table stats to Volcano planner for selectivity estimates
queue.summary: Plan: add optional tableStats param to buildPlan/explainPlan. Use ndistinct for equality selectivity, histograms for ranges.

queue.task: Add tableStats param to Volcano buildPlan/explainPlan, use ndistinct for selectivity estimates in Filter and HashJoin
queue.summary: Added tableStats to Volcano planner. Selectivity uses ndistinct (exact with ANALYZE). Example: est=20 actual=20 (was est=33). All tests pass.
Skipped: placeholder filled by T40.

queue.goal: HenryDB: Extract EXPLAIN methods from db.js (~350 LOC)
queue.summary: EXPLAIN extraction: 4 functions (~498 LOC total). _explain(209), _explainCompiled(36), _explainAnalyze(239), _fillScanActuals(14). 18 db dependencies.

queue.task: Extract _explain, _explainCompiled, _explainAnalyze, _fillScanActuals from db.js into explain-executor.js (~498 LOC)
queue.summary: Extracted EXPLAIN (496 LOC) into explain-executor.js. db.js 5082→4591 (54% from peak). 23 EXPLAIN tests pass.
Skipped: placeholder filled by T41.

queue.task: Git push, dashboard regenerate
queue.summary: Pushed.

queue.task: Afternoon depth: stress-test one feature area. Find bugs.
queue.summary: 8 BUILDs done, depth check triggered. Decision: stress-test join executor edge cases (NULL keys, many-to-many, CTE EXPLAIN). Need to find bugs.

queue.task: HenryDB: Run full test suite, triage failures
queue.summary: Found and fixed histogram selectivity bug. Object vs number comparison caused wrong estimates. Also confirmed: NULL join keys correct, many-to-many correct, CTE EXPLAIN has known gap.

queue.task: Session A close: push, sync, daily summary
queue.summary: Skipping session close: 5+ hours remain.

queue.task: Choose next depth work: what areas of HenryDB need investigation? What broke during stress test?
queue.summary: Generated 7 more tasks. Focus: join selectivity with stats, formatPlan extraction, Rows Removed by Filter, CTE Volcano support.

queue.goal: HenryDB: Improve join row estimates using ANALYZE stats (ndistinct-based join selectivity)
queue.summary: Plan: use PG formula join_rows = max(left,right)/max(ndv_left,ndv_right). Need to look up ndistinct for join key columns from tableStats.

queue.task: Use ndistinct-based join selectivity in Volcano planner: join_rows = max(left,right) / max(ndv_left,ndv_right)
queue.summary: Join selectivity using ndistinct: max(L,R)*min(L,R)/max(ndv_L,ndv_R). Tested with several join patterns, accurate results. 14/14 tests pass.

queue.goal: HenryDB: Extract _formatPlan from db.js (~200 LOC)
queue.summary: 3 formatting functions: _formatPlan(157), _planToYaml(34), _planToDot(24) = 215 LOC. Pure formatting, minimal db deps.

queue.task: Extract _formatPlan, _planToYaml, _planToDot from db.js into plan-format.js (~215 LOC)
queue.summary: Extracted plan formatting (215 LOC). db.js 4591→4377 (56% from peak). 23 EXPLAIN tests pass.

queue.goal: HenryDB: Add 'Rows Removed by Filter' to InstrumentedIterator output
queue.summary: Plan: in InstrumentedIterator explain(), when inner is Filter, show child.rowCount - this.rowCount as rows removed.

queue.task: Add Rows Removed by Filter to InstrumentedIterator explain output by comparing child vs parent row counts
queue.summary: Added Rows Removed by Filter to EXPLAIN ANALYZE. PG-style output. Computed from child vs parent row counts. 5 tests pass.

queue.task: Git push and sync
queue.summary: Pushed.

queue.task: 10-BUILD depth check: review work quality, find something surprising
queue.summary: 12 BUILDs done. Found 1 real bug (histogram selectivity). Mix of mechanical extraction + genuine improvements. Quality good.

queue.goal: HenryDB: Improve Volcano build for CTEs — currently falls back silently
queue.summary: Root cause: parser produces type=SELECT with ctes[], but buildPlan checks type=WITH. AST format mismatch. Simple fix.

queue.task: Fix CTE handling in Volcano planner: parser produces type=SELECT with ctes array, not type=WITH
queue.summary: Fixed CTE in Volcano: parser produces SELECT+ctes, not WITH. Also added rowCount to CTE virtual heap. 48 CTE + 14 Volcano tests pass.

queue.task: Mid-afternoon push
queue.summary: Pushed.

queue.task: Next batch: focus on cost model accuracy, query optimization depth. What areas are weakest?
queue.summary: Generated 7 more tasks. Focus: selectivity benchmark, I/O cost model, _selectInner extraction, HAVING in Volcano.

queue.goal: HenryDB: Build selectivity accuracy benchmark — test est vs actual across many query patterns
queue.summary: Plan: benchmark test comparing est vs actual for equality, range, join, combined. Report accuracy ratio.

queue.task: Create selectivity-accuracy.test.js: test est vs actual for equality, range, join, combined queries with ANALYZE
queue.summary: Selectivity benchmark: 9 tests, all pass. Equality and wide range perfect (1.00). AND range 1.81x (independence assumption). Committed.

queue.goal: HenryDB: Add I/O cost model to Volcano IndexScan vs SeqScan decision
queue.summary: Plan: replace 500-row threshold with cost comparison. SeqScan=pages*1.0+rows*0.01, IndexScan=est_rows*4.0+est_rows*0.015. Crossover at ~25% selectivity.

queue.task: Add I/O cost comparison for IndexScan vs SeqScan in tryIndexScan, using selectivity * random_page_cost vs total * seq_page_cost
queue.summary: Replaced 500-row threshold with I/O cost model. SeqScan vs IndexScan cost comparison using PG-inspired constants. Crossover at ~25% selectivity. All tests pass.

queue.goal: HenryDB: Extract _selectInner from db.js (~700 LOC)
queue.summary: _selectInner: 681 LOC, 30 db deps. Extractable with db first-param pattern. Core SELECT execution.

queue.task: Extract _selectInner from db.js into select-inner.js (~681 LOC, 30 db deps)
queue.summary: Extracted _selectInner (681 LOC) into select-inner.js. Fixed missing pushdownPredicates import. db.js 4381→3703 (63% from peak). 121 tests pass.

queue.task: Git push
queue.summary: Pushed.

queue.goal: HenryDB: Add HAVING support to Volcano planner
queue.summary: HAVING exists. Found pre-existing bug: Volcano HashAggregate output wrong (missing grp column, expr=null). Non-blocking — fallback to non-Volcano path works.

queue.task: HAVING already exists in Volcano planner. Found bug: HashAggregate output is wrong (missing grp column, expr=null). Separate fix needed.
queue.summary: Fixed HAVING in Volcano: aggregate arg type mismatch (object vs string). Second AST format mismatch bug found today. 27 tests pass.

queue.task: 15-BUILD depth check: run full test sweep on henrydb
queue.summary: 17 BUILDs done, 3 bugs found. 89/89 representative tests pass (0 failures). Pattern: parser-consumer AST format mismatches are systemic — should audit.

queue.task: Final session push and daily log
queue.summary: Skipping final push: 4.5h remaining.

queue.task: Audit Volcano planner for more AST format mismatches. Found 3 today — likely more.
queue.summary: Systematic audit: found and fixed aggregate arg normalization in 4 places. Parser inconsistent about arg types. 95/95 aggregate+volcano tests pass.

queue.goal: HenryDB: Extract more from db.js — identify next-largest extractable blocks
queue.summary: Mapped remaining extractable blocks. Roadmap saved. 9 candidates totaling ~1370 LOC. Session BUILD cap approaching (17/20).

queue.task: Git push + dashboard
queue.summary: Pushed.

queue.task: 20-BUILD cap reached: mandatory depth pivot — stress test, explore, investigate
queue.summary: Depth pivot: EXPLORE tasks next. Stress test Volcano with complex queries, profile TPC-H timing, hunt for more AST bugs.

queue.task: Stress-test Volcano EXPLAIN ANALYZE across all query types: subqueries, UNION, window functions, LATERAL
queue.summary: Stress tested all query types. Found 2 bugs: (1) this→db in extracted module (4 instances), (2) UNION EXPLAIN ANALYZE dispatch. Both fixed. Subquery, window func, ORDER BY+LIMIT all work.

queue.task: Profile HenryDB: what are the slowest operations? Run tpch with timing.
queue.summary: Profiled HenryDB: Index lookup 0.9ms, simple join 6.3ms, 3-table join 13.7ms. CTE+join 70.7ms is 10x slower than equivalent join (materialization overhead). Inserts: ~600/sec on indexed tables.

queue.task: End-of-session push and daily summary
queue.summary: Not time yet: 4.5h remaining.

queue.task: Audit ALL extracted files for remaining 'this' references that should be 'db'
queue.summary: All 5 extracted files clean: no remaining this references, no Database. references. Audit passed.

queue.task: Investigate CTE 70.7ms performance: profile materialization vs join
queue.summary: CTE slowness is in legacy executor (69ms), not Volcano (5ms). Legacy does full scan + slow join. Fix: route CTEs through Volcano. Noted for future work.

queue.goal: HenryDB: Further extraction - _withCTEs + _executeRecursiveCTE (~350 LOC)
queue.summary: _withCTEs (228 LOC) + _executeRecursiveCTE (135 LOC) = 363 LOC. Clean deps: just db.execute_ast, db._select, db.views.

queue.task: Extract _withCTEs + _executeRecursiveCTE from db.js into cte-executor.js (~363 LOC)
queue.summary: Extracted CTE executor (159 LOC). First attempt had wrong line range (captured execute_ast). Fixed. db.js 3703→3546 (65% from peak). 48 CTE tests pass.

queue.task: Git push, daily log
queue.summary: Pushed.

queue.task: Write scratch notes on today's findings: AST mismatch pattern, extraction learnings
queue.summary: Wrote detailed scratch notes: AST mismatch pattern (4 instances), extraction lessons (4 common bugs), size estimate accuracy, total 7 bugs found.

queue.task: Run broader test sweep: 50 random test files to find regressions
queue.summary: 612 tests across 50 random test files: 0 failures. All pass in 20.5 seconds. No regressions.

queue.task: Session A final: push, summary, CURRENT.md
queue.summary: Not time yet: 4h+ remaining.

queue.goal: HenryDB: Extract _selectInfoSchema + _selectPgCatalog from db.js (~160 LOC)
queue.summary: 3 functions, 151 LOC total. Pure metadata queries, minimal db deps.

queue.task: Extract _selectInfoSchema + _selectPgCatalog + _filterPgCatalogRows from db.js (~151 LOC)
queue.summary: Extracted catalog queries (150 LOC). db.js 3549→3400 (66% from peak). 35 catalog tests pass. Had to redo extraction (wrong boundary caught _createSequence).

queue.goal: HenryDB: Extract _union + _intersect + _except + helpers from db.js (~130 LOC)
queue.summary: 4 set operations, 112 LOC total. Small, clean extraction.

queue.task: Extract _union + _unionInner + _intersect + _except from db.js (~112 LOC)
queue.summary: Extracted set operations (112 LOC). db.js 3404→3293 (67% from peak). 61 tests pass. BUILD #20 — session cap reached.

queue.task: Git push
queue.summary: Pushed.

queue.task: Session BUILD cap: 20 BUILDs reached. Must pivot to depth for rest of session.
queue.summary: 20 BUILD cap hit. 3412 LOC extracted, db.js 67% smaller, 7 bugs fixed. Pivoting to EXPLORE/THINK for 30+ min.

queue.task: Stress test: run tpch-mini and tpch-compiled benchmarks, check performance
queue.summary: 25/25 TPC-H tests pass (mini + compiled + benchmark). All clean.

queue.task: Test edge cases: empty tables, NULL values, very large GROUP BY, nested CTEs
queue.summary: Edge cases all pass: empty tables, NULLs, 200-group GROUP BY, nested CTEs, CTE-referencing-CTE. No bugs.

queue.task: Investigate: can Volcano executor replace legacy path entirely? What's missing?
queue.summary: Found IN_LIST bug in Volcano (returns all rows). Documented full gap analysis: IN list, correlated subqueries, complex expressions missing. Window functions work. Path to primary executor mapped.

queue.task: Update TODO.md and scratch/INDEX.md with today's findings
queue.summary: Updated TODO.md (IN_LIST bug as Urgent), scratch/INDEX.md (3 new notes). Knowledge captured.

queue.task: Final session sync: commit, push, update CURRENT.md
queue.summary: Not final yet: 4h remaining. Continuing after depth pivot.

queue.goal: Fix IN_LIST bug in Volcano buildPredicate — correctness issue
queue.summary: Parser uses IN_LIST with left/values. buildPredicate handles IN with expr/values. Need IN_LIST alias.

queue.task: Add IN_LIST case to buildPredicate (alias for IN with different field names)
queue.summary: Fixed IN_LIST bug: parser uses IN_LIST type, buildPredicate handled only IN. Added IN_LIST case. NOT IN also works. 23/23 tests pass.

queue.task: Commit and push all accumulated changes
Run another 50-test random sweep after IN_LIST fix
Daily log evening summary
End session: sync workspace and knowledge files
